title: TrialOrgSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents the settings in a trial user’s org. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

enableSampleDataDeleted.description: Indicates whether sample data may be deleted on trial orgs (true) or not (false). The default value is false.

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of a TrialOrgSettings component.
